title: Text Representation Path
description: Build fluency in Text Representation inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Word Embeddings
steps.summary: Dense vector representations of words, often used in natural language processing tasks. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Representation. Compare it with Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe) and Word2Vec embeddings. It opens into Word Embeddings (Word2Vec, GloVe) and static word embeddings.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Token Merging
steps.summary: Token Merging belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Representation. Start after Token. It opens into Token Merging (ToMe) and Chunked Token Merging.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Token Dropping
steps.summary: Token Dropping belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Text Representation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Text Representation. Start after Token. It opens into Patchwise Token Dropping and Progressive Token Dropping.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Word2Vec (Skip-Gram, CBOW)
